tellraw.axeUpgrade: just upgraded it's Axe to level
tellraw.bottleUpgrade: just upgraded it's Bottle to level
tellraw.hoeUpgrade: just upgraded it's Speed Hoe to level
tellraw.luckUpgrade: just upgraded it's luck to level
tellraw.plant_seed_error: Right click with a seed to plant it!
ctm.tuto1.1: This is the tutorial area. Go to the vending machines to buy seeds.
ctm.tuto1.2: Left-click to cycle through the items in the crops machine.
ctm.tuto2.1: Right-click to buy the wheat seed.
ctm.tuto3.1: Go to your farmland to plant the seed.
ctm.tuto3.2: Right-click a field with your seed selected to plant it.
ctm.tuto4.1: When the plant is fully grown, right-click with your an hand to collect it.
ctm.tuto5.1: The tool in your hotbar changes whenever you drop it.
ctm.tuto5.2:
After the plant starts growing for the second time, break it with the axe to collect its wood.
Make sure to chop it down while its growing.
ctm.tuto9.1: We will water one of them. Look behind you to refill your water.
ctm.tuto9.2: This is a fountain. Switch your tool to a bottle and right-click the water stream to fill it.
ctm.tuto9.3: This is a valve. If fountains are not working, turn them on by right-clicking this.
ctm.tuto10.1: Right-click one of the crops with the bottle to accelerate its growth. We will leave the other one paused for now.
ctm.tuto11.1: If you don't harvest a plant, it will eventually yield a useless rotten fruit.
ctm.tuto11.2: And if a crop overgrows, it will break nearby crops.
ctm.tuto11.3: Break the crop after it finishes growing to continue.
ctm.tuto12.1: Did you hear that? A customer has arrived! Go check it out.
ctm.tuto12.2: You must talk to customers to see what they want by right-clicking them.
ctm.tuto13.1: They'll tell you what they want and how much they need.
ctm.tuto13.2: Right-click them if you have the items they asked for.
ctm.tuto15.1: A customer has arrived at the other shop! Go and check it out.
ctm.tuto15.2: Here, you will have as much time as you want. However, real customers get bored, and if you don't sell the items in time, you'll lose a heart.
ctm.tuto16.1: Customers will pay you. The number on top of your hearts shows your money. Right now, you have 6 coins.
ctm.tuto16.2: You will use money to buy seeds and upgrades. Go to the shop to buy an upgrade. (In this tutorial, every purchase is free!)
ctm.tuto16.3: Left-click to cycle, right-click to buy. Try buying an upgrade now.
ctm.tuto16.4: Each time you buy an upgrade, its price increases.
ctm.tuto17.1: That's everything! You can play the tutorial again as many times as you want.
book.title: Farming 101
book.wheat:
%s %s
A common crop. Easy to grow.
book.azalea:
%s %s
Takes a bit longer to grow.
book.tomato:
%s %s
Actually, tomato is botanically classified as a fruit. Easy to grow.
book.eggplant:
%s %s
Its called aubergine, no other way. Easy to grow.
book.apple:
%s %s
Keeps the doctor away. Takes a while to grow.
book.crystal:
%s %s
A mystical plant that takes a long time to grow.
book.carrot:
%s %s
Good for your eyes. Grows very fast.
book.pumpkin:
%s %s
You can only harvest this one once.
book.pear:
%s %s
If you ask an elm for pears it may take a while to grow them.
review.0:
I waited for hours and they wouldn't sell me %s.
0/10
review.1:
I only wanted %s but they made me wait for ever.
I'll sue
review.2: It's faster to grow your own %s than to buy it here.
review.3: Even a snail could plant %s faster than this guys.
review.4: By the time I finally got my %s, it had its own mid-life crisis. Terrible service.
review.5: Legends say the people who ordered %s before me are still waiting in that line.
review.6: I could have built a time machine, traveled to the future, and bought %s there faster.
review.7: They must be hand-crafting each %s from scratch using tools from the Stone Age.
review.8: I asked for %s, not a test of my mortal patience. Never coming back.
review.9: My hair turned gray while waiting for %s. Do they source it from another galaxy?
review.10: The pics online looked fresh but I asked for %s and never got an answer. Don't fall for this AI scam.
review.11: Unbelievable. I came in just wanting %s and ended up completely ignored. They wouldn't even get the manager. Your staff has zero sense of urgency or customer respect. I have never felt so degraded as a paying customer. Avoid at all costs!
